data.title: Critical One Expands Howells Lake Project to Tap New Antimony-Gold Targets
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

Madison Metals, Inc. ( (TSE:CRTL) ) has issued an announcement.

Critical One Energy Inc. has expanded its Howells Lake Antimony-Gold Project by 67%, acquiring an additional 9,979 hectares to cover new high-priority antimony and gold targets identified through soil sample analysis. This strategic move positions the company to capitalize on the growing demand for critical minerals, particularly antimony, which has seen a significant price increase due to global supply constraints. The expansion enhances Critical One’s potential to transform Howells Lake into a district-scale project, offering significant discovery potential and value for shareholders.

More about Madison Metals, Inc.

Critical One Energy Inc., formerly Madison Metals Inc., is a Canadian exploration company focused on critical metals and minerals. The company is known for its work in the antimony and gold sectors, particularly through its Howells Lake Antimony-Gold Project in Ontario, Canada.

Average Trading Volume: 90,929

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$20.38M

For detailed information about CRTL stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Pearl River Faces Cease Trade Order Due to Delayed Filings
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

The latest update is out from Pearl River Holdings ( (TSE:PRH) ).

Pearl River Holdings Limited has announced that the Ontario Securities Commission issued a cease trade order against the company due to its failure to file required financial documents for the year ended December 31, 2024, within the prescribed time frame. Consequently, the Canadian Investment Regulatory Organization halted trading of Pearl River’s common shares. The company expects to complete the necessary filings by September 21, 2025, which could potentially impact its market operations and investor relations.

More about Pearl River Holdings

Pearl River Holdings Limited, through its subsidiaries, is primarily engaged in the manufacturing and distribution of plastic products across China, Australia, and the United States.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: C$3.69M

For a thorough assessment of PRH stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Izotropic’s AI Breakthrough in Breast CT Imaging
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

The latest announcement is out from Izotropic ( (TSE:IZO) ).

Izotropic has announced a breakthrough in breast CT imaging with the integration of a proprietary AI-based machine-learning reconstruction algorithm into its IzoView Breast CT Imaging System. This algorithm, developed in collaboration with The Johns Hopkins University School of Medicine, enhances image quality by reducing noise without increasing radiation dose, positioning IzoView to potentially set new global standards for breast CT imaging. The algorithm’s unique approach addresses the limitations of existing denoising methods, offering a competitive edge in the market and reinforcing the case for low-dose protocols in regulatory submissions.

Spark’s Take on TSE:IZO Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:IZO is a Underperform.

Izotropic’s overall stock score is low, primarily due to significant financial challenges, including consistent revenue shortfalls, negative income, and unsustainable cash flows. Despite some positive technical indicators and promising corporate events suggesting potential future growth, the company’s current financial instability and negative valuation metrics weigh heavily on its stock score.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:IZO stock, click here.

More about Izotropic

Izotropic Corporation is a medical device company focused on commercializing innovative, emerging technologies and imaging-based products for more accurate screening, diagnosis, and treatment of breast cancers.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

data.title: Pozzi Milano Approves Merger with Mascagni Casa to Optimize Operations
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

Pozzi Milano S.P.A. ( (IT:POZ) ) has issued an update.

Pozzi Milano S.p.A. has approved a merger project to incorporate its wholly-owned subsidiary, Mascagni Casa S.r.l., into its operations. This merger aims to streamline corporate structure, optimize resource management, and reduce costs by eliminating duplicate functions. The merger will be executed using a simplified procedure, with no changes to Pozzi Milano’s share capital or statutory activities. The merger is expected to enhance operational synergies and improve financial flows, with Pozzi Milano assuming all assets and liabilities of Mascagni Casa.

The most recent analyst rating on (IT:POZ) stock is a Buy with a EUR1.25 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Pozzi Milano S.P.A. stock, see the IT:POZ Stock Forecast page.

More about Pozzi Milano S.P.A.

Pozzi Milano S.p.A. operates in the table fashion sector, owning the ‘EasyLife’ brand and, through its subsidiary Pozzi Brand Diffusion S.r.l., the ‘Pozzi’ and ‘Castello Pozzi’ brands. The company is focused on a licensing strategy and is involved in the home decor and furniture accessories sector through its fully controlled subsidiary, Mascagni Casa S.r.l.

Average Trading Volume: 14,293

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: €15.82M

data.description:

First Keystone ( (FKYS) ) has shared an update.

On August 28, 2025, First Keystone Corporation announced a third quarter cash dividend of $0.28 per share, maintaining the year-to-date dividend at $0.84 per share, consistent with the previous year. The company reported significant financial growth in the second quarter of 2025, with assets increasing by 1.4%, net loans by 4.1%, and deposits by 7.4%. Notably, net income surged by 123.3% to $3,967,000, reflecting strong financial performance and positioning the company favorably in the financial services industry.

The most recent analyst rating on (FKYS) stock is a Hold with a $18.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on First Keystone stock, see the FKYS Stock Forecast page.

First Keystone’s overall stock score is primarily influenced by its financial performance, which shows mixed results with profitability challenges. Technical analysis indicates some support in the longer term but lacks strong momentum. Valuation is a positive aspect, with a reasonable P/E ratio and an attractive dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on FKYS stock, click here.

First Keystone Community Bank, a subsidiary of First Keystone Corporation, offers innovative business and personal banking products with a focus on blending traditional values with future vision.
